title: Neuronal wiring diagram of an adult brain
abstract: We present the FlyWire connectome, a complete map of the 139,255 neurons and ~50 million chemical synapses in the brain of an adult female Drosophila melanogaster, reconstructed from the FAFB electron microscopy volume using AI segmentation and crowd-sourced proofreading.
notes: Already in existing 102. Complete adult fly brain connectome.
